# Let's read the file content to inspect spans.
path = "/mnt/data/file-Sz7o7er8AcmFrvLCHcYdaP-text_to_analyse.txt"
try:
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        text = f.read()
    len_text = len(text)
    text[:1000], len_text
except Exception as e:
    str(e)

path = "/mnt/data/file-Sz7o7er8AcmFrvLCHcYdaP-text_to_analyse.txt"
try:
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        text = f.read()
    print("L", len(text))
    print(text[:1000])
except Exception as e:
    import traceback, sys
    traceback.print_exc()

# Define span texts exactly as they appear in the loaded text
ay1 = "يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ مِنْ نَفْسٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَخَلَقَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَبَثَّ مِنْهُمَا رِجَالًا كَثِيرًا وَنِسَاءً"
ay2 = "إِنْ يَكُونُوا فُقَرَاءَ يُغْنِهِمُ اللَّهُ مِنْ فَضْلِهِ وَاللَّهُ وَاسِعٌ عَلِيمٌ"
hadith = "أُذِنَ لِلرِّجَالِ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجُوا الأرْبَعَةَ"
ay3 = "وَلَنْ تَسْتَطِيعُوا أَنْ تَعْدِلُوا بَيْنَ النِّسَاءِ وَلَوْ حَرَصْتُمْ فَلَا تَمِيلُوا كُلَّ الْمَيْلِ فَتَذَرُوهَا كَالْمُعَلَّقَةِ وَإِنْ تُصْلِحُوا وَتَتَّقُوا فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا"

# Find occurrences
start1 = text.find(ay1)
start2 = text.find(ay2)
start3 = text.find(ay3)
start4 = text.find(hadith)

start1, start2, start3, start4

ends = { 
    "ay1": start1 + len(ay1),
    "ay2": start2 + len(ay2),
    "ay3": start3 + len(ay3),
    "hadith": start4 + len(hadith)
}
ends

def verify(label, start, end, span):
    substr = text[start:end]
    ok = substr == span
    return ok, substr == span, len(substr), len(span), substr, span

for label, start in [("ay1", start1), ("ay2", start2), ("ay3", start3), ("hadith", start4) ]:
    end = {"ay1": ends["ay1"], "ay2": ends["ay2"], "ay3": ends["ay3"], "hadith": ends["hadith"]}[label]
    ok = text[start:end] == {"ay1": ay1, "ay2": ay2, "ay3": ay3, "hadith": hadith}[label]
    print(label, start, end, ok)

spans = [
    (114,268, ay1, "Aya"),
    (327,410, ay2, "Aya"),
    (750,954, ay3, "Aya"),
    (468,517, hadith, "Hadith")
]
for s,e,span,typ in spans:
    print(typ, s, e, len(span))
